news.title:
Global Health Ltd to meet investors/analysts on Feb 27, 2026, in Gurugram.
Meeting organized with BofA Securities; no UPSI will be shared.
news.summary:
Global Health Ltd to meet investors/analysts on Feb 27, 2026, in Gurugram.
Meeting organized with BofA Securities; no UPSI will be shared.

news.title:
Global Health Ltd reported Q3 FY26 revenue growth of 19.1% YoY to INR 11,428M; EBITDA ex-Noida rose 10.9% YoY with margins at 25.4%.
Medanta Noida faced EBITDA loss of INR 320M; PAT dropped 33.5% YoY to INR 950M due to depreciation, finance costs, and exceptional items.
news.summary:
Global Health Ltd reported Q3 FY26 revenue growth of 19.1% YoY to INR 11,428M; EBITDA ex-Noida rose 10.9% YoY with margins at 25.4%.
Medanta Noida faced EBITDA loss of INR 320M; PAT dropped 33.5% YoY to INR 950M due to depreciation, finance costs, and exceptional items.

news.title:
Global Health Ltd approved unaudited Q3 and 9-month results for Dec 2025.
New head for Diagnostic Services appointed; reappointments and a new director recommended.
news.summary:
Global Health Ltd approved unaudited Q3 and 9-month results for Dec 2025.
New head for Diagnostic Services appointed; reappointments and a new director recommended.

news.title:
Global Health's Q3 revenue rose to 11.2B rupees from 9.43B YoY.
This reflects strong year-over-year growth for the company.
news.summary:
Global Health's Q3 revenue rose to 11.2B rupees from 9.43B YoY.
This reflects strong year-over-year growth for the company.

news.title:
Global Health's Q3 profit before exceptional items fell to 1.56B from 1.89B YoY.
The company recorded an exceptional item of 366M during the quarter.
news.summary:
Global Health's Q3 profit before exceptional items fell to 1.56B from 1.89B YoY.
The company recorded an exceptional item of 366M during the quarter.

news.title:
Global Health Ltd to hold a Board Meeting on Feb 4, 2026, to review Q3 and nine-month financial results.
Trading window remains closed until 48 hours post-declaration of results, adhering to SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
Global Health Ltd to hold a Board Meeting on Feb 4, 2026, to review Q3 and nine-month financial results.

news.title:
Crisil upgraded Global Health Ltd's long-term rating to AA Stable from AA Positive.
Short-term rating reaffirmed at A1; continuous surveillance and review maintained.
news.summary:
Crisil upgraded Global Health Ltd's long-term rating to AA Stable from AA Positive.

The meeting with White Oak Capital Management will be one-on-one in Noida.

news.title:
Adani Enterprises acquires 72.8% stake in FSTC for ₹820 crore; TCS announces 5-year SAP Cloud-AI deal.
Bandhan Bank to sell ₹6,900 crore NPAs; Global Health opens 550-bed Medanta hospital in Noida.
news.summary:
Adani Enterprises acquires 72.8% stake in FSTC for ₹820 crore; TCS announces 5-year SAP Cloud-AI deal.
Bandhan Bank to sell ₹6,900 crore NPAs; Global Health opens 550-bed Medanta hospital in Noida.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal expects 17% upside in Global Health due to strong operational momentum and expansion plans.
Medanta Noida's 226-bed facility strategically serves high-demand areas, boosting long-term growth for Global Health.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal expects 17% upside in Global Health due to strong operational momentum and expansion plans.

Meetings to occur in Gurugram, Singapore, and Hong Kong; no sensitive info to be shared.

news.summary: HSBC upgrades Global Health (Medanta) to 'Hold' with target price of Rs 1,270.

news.title:
Global Health Ltd shared audio recording of Nov 10 earnings call hosted by IIFL Capital.
Conference covered Q2 & H1 financial results ending Sept 30, 2025, per SEBI requirements.

news.title:
Global Health Ltd reports 14.8% revenue growth in recent results.
The company announces a ₹41,200M capex plan over 5 years.
news.summary:
Global Health Ltd reports 14.8% revenue growth in recent results.
The company announces a ₹41,200M capex plan over 5 years.

news.title:
Global Health targets double-digit growth by expanding specialties and regional hubs, adding 1,000+ beds by FY28.
Investing in robotics, transplant, oncology infra; focusing on margins via case-mix optimization and asset-light model.
news.summary:
Global Health targets double-digit growth by expanding specialties and regional hubs, adding 1,000+ beds by FY28.
Investing in robotics, transplant, oncology infra; focusing on margins via case-mix optimization and asset-light model.

news.title:
Medanta Q2 profit rises 21% YoY to Rs 158 cr; revenue at Rs 1,099 cr.
Shares fell 2.3% to Rs 1,251.45 on BSE; growth broad-based per CEO.
news.summary:
Medanta Q2 profit rises 21% YoY to Rs 158 cr; revenue at Rs 1,099 cr.
Shares fell 2.3% to Rs 1,251.45 on BSE; growth broad-based per CEO.

news.title:
Global Health's Q2 FY26 revenue rose 14.8% YoY to INR 11,189 mn.
PAT grew 21.1% YoY to INR 1,584 mn; Noida hospital ramp-up caused losses.
news.summary:

news.title:
Global Health's Q2, H1 FY26 results approved; Mumbai bed capacity up 50% to 750.
Mumbai project costs rise to Rs.1530 Cr; Rs.85 Cr spent on staff flats.

news.title:
Global Health Ltd announces Q2 FY2026 earnings call on Nov 10, 2025, hosted by IIFL Capital.
Medanta operates six hospitals with 3,062 beds, plans four new hospitals with 2,000 beds.
